adv_arb_inspect_subtitle: Read from the picked firmware folder. The next step asks for the new target value.
adv_convert_xml_desc: Decrypt .x firmware files to rawprogram .xml format
adv_country_subtitle: Pick the region code to write into devinfo.
adv_detect_arb_desc: Compare rollback index between device and firmware images
adv_dump_partitions_desc: Read selected partitions from device to image files via EDL
adv_dump_physical_desc: Dump whole LUNs (physical storage) from device to image files via EDL
adv_flash_partitions_desc: Write image files to selected partitions on device via EDL
adv_flash_physical_desc: Write raw images directly to whole LUNs (physical storage) via EDL
adv_image_info_desc: Show AVB metadata for one or more .img files
adv_patch_arb_desc: Bypass rollback protection in chained partition images
adv_patch_devinfo_desc: Modify the country code in devinfo/persist images
adv_rebuild_vbmeta_desc: Rebuild vbmeta.img with updated hash descriptors
adv_region_convert_desc: Convert vendor_boot region code between PRC and ROW
adv_region_target_desc: Opens the PRC / ROW target picker.
adv_region_target_subtitle: Pick PRC or ROW for the patched vendor_boot output.
adv_simple_flash_desc: Flashes only, with no checks or modifications. Behaves as close as possible to the stock firmware flash script.
adv_src_detect_arb: vbmeta.img to read its rollback index
adv_src_detect_arb_start: Press Start to run rollback protection detection.
adv_src_dump_partitions: EDL loader to scan the device and dump partitions
adv_src_dump_physical: EDL loader to dump whole physical LUNs
adv_src_flash_partitions: Firmware folder to cherry-pick partitions from
adv_src_flash_physical: EDL loader to flash raw images onto whole LUNs
adv_src_image_info: One or more .img files to inspect
adv_src_rebuild_vbmeta: vbmeta.img (chained images must be in the same folder)
apatch_superkey_mismatch: The two entries don't match. Enter the superkey again from the start.
apatch_superkey_subtitle: 8–63 alphanumeric characters. Used as the root authorization key — keep it private.
apatch_superkey_verify_subtitle: Enter the same superkey one more time to confirm. Mismatch resets the flow.
arb_detect_is_anti_rollback: This device has rollback protection enabled.
arb_detect_no_anti_rollback: This device does not have rollback protection enabled.
arb_index_popup_subtitle: Enter a 10-digit unix timestamp; UTC preview appears when complete.
dash_adb_server_blocking: An external adb server is holding the USB interface. Kill it to let LTBox connect.
dash_adb_unauthorized: Allow USB debugging on the device.
dash_unsupported_platform: Unsupported platform — most operations are disabled. LTBox requires a Qualcomm device.
driver_missing_desc: Click the button to download and install the signed Qualcomm USB driver.
driver_needs_internet_tip: Requires an internet connection to download.
driver_update_desc: Installed Qualcomm USB driver {current}; {latest} is available.
dual_usb_advisory_desc: Connect through the port on the long edge of the device for operations to run smoothly.
dual_usb_advisory_title: This model has two USB-C ports
dump_parts_select_subtitle:
Select partitions to dump.
Each is saved as <label>.img in the folder you choose.
err_advanced_detect_arb_dedicated: Detect Rollback Protection uses a dedicated worker; the file pipeline should not run.
err_advanced_image_info_dedicated: Image Info uses a dedicated multi-file flow.
err_avb_signing_key_unknown: {image}: signing key public key {key} is not one of the bundled AOSP test keys; aborting before writes.
err_country_folder_expected: Patch Country Code expects a folder containing devinfo.img and persist.img; got {path}
err_country_images_missing: Neither devinfo.img nor persist.img found in {path}
err_country_target_missing: No target country code selected; pick one in the popup before starting.
err_edl_transition_failed: Could not reboot the device to EDL mode.
err_flash_abl_restore_failed: Flash: failed to restore the original bootloader (abl_a) - device left in EDL: {error}
err_flash_device_key_unknown: Flash: device vbmeta is signed with an unknown key - aborting before any write
err_flash_device_testkey_unsupported: Flash: device testkey is not the supported 4096 testkey - cannot re-sign for this device; aborting
err_flash_edl_avb_invalid: Flash: no valid AVB image on either slot in EDL - resetting to EDL and aborting
err_flash_efisp_arb_failed: efisp _arb GBL flash failed after staging the test-key ARB chain. Device left in EDL to avoid bricking: {error}
err_flash_efisp_arb_missing: Internal error: test-key ARB chain staged but no efisp GBL was downloaded.
err_flash_key2_cross_region_unsupported: Flash: cross-region install of fixed-key firmware is not supported yet - choose same-region or use testkey firmware; aborting
err_flash_key2_device_constraint: Flash: a fixed-key device only accepts same-region, non-downgrade fixed-key firmware - aborting
err_flash_model_mismatch_pre_edl: Flash: firmware/device model mismatch - aborting before EDL
err_flash_tb322fc_prc_only: Flash: TB322FC is PRC-only - cross-region or non-CN country settings are not allowed; aborting
err_flash_vbmeta_key_unknown: Flash: firmware vbmeta is signed with an unknown key (neither testkey nor fixed) - aborting before any write
err_patch_arb_rollback_refuse: {image} rollback index is {index}; refusing to patch.
err_patch_arb_target_missing: Bypass Rollback Protection: missing target index.
err_region_missing_device_region: Region conversion requested but no device region was selected.
err_region_target_missing: No target region selected; pick PRC or ROW in the popup before starting.
err_region_vbmeta_missing: Region Convert requires vbmeta.img beside vendor_boot.img; missing {path}
err_region_vendor_boot_expected: Region Convert expects vendor_boot.img; select the firmware folder's vendor_boot.img.
err_rescue_loader_invalid: boot recovery: loader must be .melf / .mbn / .elf / .xml / .x, got: {path}
err_rescue_loader_missing: boot recovery: loader does not exist: {path}
err_rescue_loader_not_selected: boot recovery: EDL loader not selected.
err_rescue_nothing_to_flash: boot recovery: nothing to flash after patch/re-sign.
err_rescue_region_not_selected: boot recovery: target region (PRC/ROW) not selected.
err_rescue_unsupported_layout: boot recovery: no vendor_boot/vbmeta found on LUN 0; unsupported device layout (for example TB323FU). Aborted before any write.
err_rescue_work_dir_failed: boot recovery work directory creation failed: {error}
err_rollback_on_fastboot_unreachable: Bootloader vars unavailable; rollback-index patch aborted before flashing.
err_sysupdate_no_adb: System Update needs an ADB connection to apply changes. ADB not reachable: {error}
exec_executing_subtitle: Please wait while the operation completes.
flash_confirm_warning: ⚠ Data kept: a downgrade or firmware region change can fail to boot without a wipe.
flash_confirm_warning_wipe: ⚠ Data wipe: back up anything you need before starting.
flash_data_subtitle: Keep or erase user data during flash?
flash_folder_desc: Folder containing firmware images and rawprogram XML
flash_parts_confirm_erase_warn: ⚠ ERASE — the following partitions will be WIPED and cannot be recovered.
flash_parts_select_subtitle:
Double-click a row to pick an image.
Click the checkbox to cycle: skip → write → ⛔ erase.
flash_phys_confirm_subtitle: Selected LUNs will be overwritten from sector 0.
flash_phys_select_subtitle: Double-click a LUN to pick an image. Writes start at sector 0 and overwrite the LUN.
flash_region_subtitle: What region is your device hardware?
flash_target_subtitle: Install firmware from a different region or same region?
flashtarget_other_desc: Install or update firmware for a region different from the hardware
flashtarget_other_desc_prc: Install the Global ROM on a China-market device
flashtarget_other_desc_row: Install the China ROM on a Global-market device
flashtarget_same_desc: Install or restore firmware that matches the hardware region
flashtarget_same_desc_prc: Install the China ROM on a China-market device
flashtarget_same_desc_row: Install the Global ROM on a Global-market device
live_adb_no_device_info: No device — proceeding without ADB info
live_adb_no_kver: Could not detect kernel version — LKM asset match may fail
live_adb_no_reboot_route: No ADB device available for reboot attempt — user must reboot manually
live_adb_state_cannot_reboot_edl: ADB is in `{state}` state; cannot reboot to EDL
live_adb_wait_after_fastboot_failed: ADB did not connect after continue-to-system: {error}
live_advanced_use_dedicated: Use dedicated wizard for partition/physical flash/dump
live_arb_edl_dump: No stored rollback index over fastboot — reading boot + vbmeta_system over EDL
live_arb_no_signing_key: {name}: no signing key (public key {key} unknown + no test key) — skipping
live_arb_on_fastboot_unreachable: Bootloader vars unavailable; cannot choose rollback target. Aborting and rebooting.
live_arb_skip_unknown_device: {name}: needs_patch but device index unknown — skipping
live_arb_skip_unknown_pubkey: {name}: public key {key} not in test-key map — skipping
live_arb_tb323_resigned: TB323FU: re-signed boot/vbmeta_system/recovery/vbmeta with the test key ({boot}/{vbs}).
live_arb_tb323_skip_uptodate: TB323FU: install images are not behind the device — flashing stock (no re-sign).
live_avb_no_chained_fallback: No chained images next to vbmeta; using simple re-sign fallback
live_avb_rebuild_warning: Warning: vbmeta rebuild does not fix chained footers; use Region Convert for vendor_boot.
live_closing_dump_session: Closing dump session (device returning to Sahara)
live_country_already_matches: No files modified — country code already matches or not detected
live_country_warning: Warning: {error}; firmware already flashed, continuing to reboot.
live_driver_install_cancelled: Driver install cancelled — approve the Windows prompt and try again.
live_driver_running_installer: Launching the signed driver installer — approve the Windows prompt...
live_dumpparts_critical_failure: CRITICAL: {labels} dump failed; output incomplete. Do not use for rescue/flash.
live_edl_already: Device already in EDL — skipping reboot
live_edl_loader_missing: xbl_s_devprg_ns.melf not found in firmware folder
live_edl_reboot_no_port_notice:
The device rebooted to EDL mode, but the PC couldn't find its port.
Nothing has been written yet, so the device isn't bricked (unless it was already bricked before you started).
Hold Volume Down and Power to force a reboot.
live_flash_adb_to_bootloader: Device in ADB — rebooting to bootloader for var probe...
live_flash_country_devinfo: Country code: {code} — country partition will be patched after flash.
live_flash_country_skip: Country code: do not change — devinfo/persist untouched
live_flash_efisp_erase_failed: efisp erase failed ({error}) — continuing to system reset
live_flash_efisp_flash_failed: efisp flash failed ({error}) — continuing to system reset
live_flash_key2_proceed: Fixed-key firmware on a fixed-key device: same region, no downgrade - proceeding as-is
live_flash_key2_resign: Fixed-key firmware on a testkey device: re-signing to testkey and preserving the device bootloader
live_flash_skip_adb: Device in Bootloader/EDL — skipping ADB step
live_flash_tb323fu_force_auto: TB323FU detected — rollback protection bypass forced to Auto.
live_flash_tb323fu_region_efisp: TB323FU: region handled by efisp GBL; boot-chain conversion skipped.
live_flash_vbmeta_key_unknown: Firmware vbmeta signing key is unknown (neither testkey nor fixed) - aborting
live_manual_reboot_edl_wait: Reboot the device to EDL (9008) mode manually. LTBox will keep waiting.
live_region_missing_skip: WARNING: vendor_boot.img or vbmeta.img missing — region patch skipped
live_region_pair_rebuilt: Repaired vendor_boot footer and rebuilt vbmeta: {path}
live_region_source_matches_target: Source already matches target — skipping patch (no output written)
live_rescue_avb_inspect_skip: WARN: AVB inspect for model check failed: {error} — skipping
live_rescue_no_fingerprint_skip: WARN: vendor_boot has no fingerprint property — skipping model check
live_rescue_no_region_bytes_changed: Slot {slot}: no region bytes changed — already on target region?
live_rescue_no_testkey: Slot {slot}: no test key (testkey_rsa{2048,4096}.pem) under {path} — cannot re-sign vbmeta
live_root_completed: Root flash complete — device booting into system
live_root_wait_adb_for_apk: Waiting up to {seconds}s for ADB to install manager APK
live_sysupdate_fastboot_to_adb: Device in Bootloader — continuing to system, then waiting for ADB...
live_unroot_completed: Stock images restored — device booting into system
live_wait_edl_port: Waiting for Qualcomm 9008 port to appear…
log_apatch_kallsyms_all_missing: CONFIG_KALLSYMS_ALL=y missing — non-fatal, but some KPMs may need it
log_apatch_kallsyms_inconclusive: CONFIG_KALLSYMS check inconclusive (no IKCONFIG payload) — proceeding, but patch may fail
log_avb_unsigned_skip_key: is unsigned; no key will be specified.
log_avb_vbmeta_unsigned_copied: vbmeta is unsigned (algorithm = NONE) — copied stock blob to
log_edl_reset_reopen_skipped: Reset skipped — could not re-open EDL session
log_edl_sahara_skip_hello_retry: Sahara HELLO timed out — retrying with skip-hello fallback (PBL HELLO may be consumed / not emitted on this firmware)
log_flash_wipe_disabled: Wipe disabled — userdata / metadata will be skipped
log_flash_wipe_enabled: Wipe enabled — erasing userdata / metadata / frp before flash
log_gki_no_manager_apk: No manager APK found in kernel ZIP; skipping auto-install
log_gki_replacement_kver_missing: Replacement kernel version: (could not locate `Linux version` banner — wrong file?)
log_gki_stock_kver_missing: Stock kernel version: (could not locate `Linux version` banner — continuing)
log_ksu_fetching_stable: Fetching latest Stable LKM ZIP from GitHub…
log_ksu_no_stock_init: no stock init in ramdisk — skipping rename
log_ksu_patching_init_boot: Patching init_boot.img — swapping init + staging kernelsu.ko…
log_magisk_extracting_payload: Extracting payload from APK (magisk, magiskinit, init-ld, stub.apk)
log_magisk_preinit_adb_unavailable: preinit device: (ADB unavailable — falling back to runtime detection)
log_magisk_preinit_none: preinit device: (none detected — Magisk will fall back at runtime)
log_nightly_validating_manual: validating manual run id {id} against workflow {workflow} (branch {branch})
log_root_efisp_ok: efisp is provisioned — continuing (AVB/vbmeta handled by GBL)
log_root_manager_apk_manual_reminder: Manager APK was not installed during the run — install it manually now: {path}
log_root_manager_apk_push_failed: Could not copy the manager APK to the device; install it manually from the local file below.
log_root_manager_apk_pushed: Copied the manager APK to {path} on the device — open that file on the device to install it.
log_root_skip_avb_tb323fu: TB323FU GBL root — skipping AVB re-sign and vbmeta (verification handled by efisp)
nightly_auto_desc: Fetch latest artifact from CI workflow
nightly_manual_subtitle: Enter the numeric GitHub Actions run ID (digits only).
op_unroot_phase_2: Flash stock boot + vbmeta from backup
ota_popup_error: Could not query Lenovo OTA server.
phys_select_subtitle: Tick each physical LUN to include. No GPT is read — the whole LUN is targeted.
provider_apatch_desc: Kernel-patching root solution for Android, by bmax121
provider_folkpatch_desc: APatch-based kernel-level root solution, by LyraVoid
provider_ksu_desc: Kernel-based root solution for Android, by tiann
provider_ksu_next_desc: Actively maintained KernelSU fork, by rifsxd
provider_magisk_desc: The Magic Mask for Android, by topjohnwu
provider_resukisu_desc: Fork of SukiSU Ultra with added changes + stability, by ReSukiSU
provider_sukisu_desc: KernelSU fork with some interesting changes, by ShirkNeko
reboot_confirm_body: The device will reboot into {target} mode.
reboot_subtitle: Current connection: {conn}. Unavailable targets stay disabled.
rescue_region_popup_subtitle: Pick the hardware region. Patches vendor_boot per slot.
root_apk_subtitle: Choose the Magisk fork manager APK to install.
root_kernel_subtitle: A boot.img or kernel ZIP (AnyKernel3 / Image / kernel binary)
root_kernel_version_invalid: Enter a kernel version like 6.1 or 6.1.75.
root_kernel_version_manual_subtitle: ADB could not detect the KernelSU LKM kernel. Enter major.minor; patch is optional.
root_kpm_desc: .kpm modules to embed in the patch
root_kpm_subtitle: One or more .kpm files to embed. Re-open the picker to add more.
root_mode_subtitle: LKM patches existing kernel. GKI replaces it entirely.
root_source_subtitle: How to obtain the nightly build?
root_type_subtitle: Choose which root family to use.
root_version_subtitle: Stable is recommended for most users.
settings_default_loader_help: Optional. Auto-fills loader pickers. Best for one model; missing paths block start.
settings_default_loader_unset: Not set — picker shown each time
simple_flash_confirm_warning: ⚠ Skips all safety checks. Whether user data is wiped depends on the firmware package.
simple_flash_pick_hint: Press Next to choose the firmware folder.
sysupdate_rescue_desc: Fix boot failure after OTA on converted device
unroot_method_subtitle: Choose how the device is currently rooted.
unroottype_apatch_gki_folderdesc: Select folder containing boot.img and vbmeta.img
unroottype_magisk_lkm_folderdesc: Select folder containing init_boot.img and vbmeta.img
